task: Find a flight from Dublin to anywhere under $100 tomorrow on Ryanair.
final_result_response:
I searched for flights from Dublin to anywhere on Ryanair for tomorrow (March 25, 2026) and found 13 flights under $100:

| Destination | Price |
|---|---|
| Glasgow | $20 |
| Bristol | $25 |
| Leeds Bradford | $25 |
| Newcastle | $26 |
| Manchester | $26 |
| Liverpool | $29 |
| Kerry | $30 |
| Amsterdam | $32 |
| Edinburgh | $58 |
| Madeira (Funchal) | $58 |
| Lanzarote | $58 |
| Cardiff | $68 |
| Nantes | $68 |

**Best deal: Dublin → Glasgow for just $20!** All prices are base fares for 1 adult, one-way. Additional fees (bags, seat selection) may apply at checkout. Search was done on the Ryanair Fare Finder at: https://www.ryanair.com/us/en/fare-finder?originIata=DUB&destinationIata=ANY&isReturn=false&dateOut=2026-03-25&isExactDate=true

judge.reasoning:
**Task Understanding:** The user wants to find any flight from Dublin to anywhere priced under $100 on Ryanair for tomorrow (March 25, 2026). Success would be identifying at least one valid flight meeting the criteria, ideally with price and destination details.

**Output Assessment:** The agent returned a table of 13 flights from Dublin on March 25, 2026, all under $100, ranging from $20 (Glasgow) to $68 (Cardiff/Nantes). It identified the Ryanair Fare Finder URL used for the search and highlighted the best deal (Glasgow at $20).

**Evidence:** Step 16 (browser_analyze_state) directly shows the page content the agent saw: 13 flights with exact prices matching the final response verbatim. The agent navigated Ryanair, accepted cookies, selected "One way," chose "Any destination," set the date to March 25 (confirmed in step 14), and performed the search (step 15). The reference_length metadata value of 13 also corroborates that 13 results were found. The one error (element not found at step 3) was non-fatal and the agent recovered. The execution integrity is "degraded" but there is direct evidence of task completion in the step files.

**Summary:** Step 16's file content directly confirms the agent read the Ryanair Fare Finder results and extracted 13 flights under $100, which matches the final response exactly. The reference_length of 13 corroborates the count, and the navigation steps show a complete, successful search workflow.
